machine.name: Legal Services AI Assisted Legal Operations Prior Art Search Agent Dispatcher
machine.description: Legal services workflow machine for prior art search agent dispatcher in the ai assisted legal operations workstream. It monitors dispatch AI-assisted search tasks and human review queues. This is an operational workflow example for individual and corporate legal services, not legal advice.

metadata.domain: Legal Services - AI Assisted Legal Operations
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: dispatch AI-assisted search tasks and human review queues
sourceGuidance: USPTO provisional patent applications: complete written description, inventor naming, filing fee/cover sheet, 12-month nonprovisional benefit window
USPTO Patent Center: electronic filing and application management for patent submissions
USPTO trademark process and Trademark Center: mark/goods-services review, account identity verification, filing and docket tracking
U.S. Copyright Office eCO registration: application, fee, deposit copy/copies, work-type/form selection
U.S. Copyright Office preregistration: limited-use preregistration for eligible unpublished works likely to face prerelease infringement
metadata.legalDisclaimer: Workflow automation example only; attorney review is required for legal advice, filing decisions, and jurisdiction-specific analysis.
agentActions: Route prior art search agent dispatcher to attorney review for deadline, ownership, or rights-risk triage.
Dispatch trademark_workflow_agent to optimize the next workstep for prior art search agent dispatcher.
Create or update docket/checklist tasks for prior art search agent dispatcher.
Mark prior art search agent dispatcher ready for the next controlled workflow step.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map legal intake, docket, evidence, filing-portal, and AI review signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to attorney review, workstep optimization, docket updates, or product launch gates.

sequences.name: Prior Art Search Agent Dispatcher: INCOMPLETE_OR_RISK -> ATTORNEY_REVIEW

metadata.description: Escalates when facts, rights, or deadline pressure require attorney review.

metadata.action: Route prior art search agent dispatcher to attorney review for deadline, ownership, or rights-risk triage.

sequences.name: Prior Art Search Agent Dispatcher: OPTIMIZATION_WINDOW -> OPTIMIZE_WORKSTEP

metadata.description: Fires when the matter can proceed more efficiently through AI-assisted workflow optimization.

metadata.action: Dispatch trademark_workflow_agent to optimize the next workstep for prior art search agent dispatcher.

sequences.name: Prior Art Search Agent Dispatcher: DOCKET_PRESSURE -> DOCKET_ACTION

metadata.description: Creates a docket update or checklist task for the next controlled step.

metadata.action: Create or update docket/checklist tasks for prior art search agent dispatcher.

sequences.name: Prior Art Search Agent Dispatcher: READY -> READY_FOR_NEXT_STEP

metadata.description: Signals that facts, rights posture, timing, and commercialization readiness are aligned.

metadata.action: Mark prior art search agent dispatcher ready for the next controlled workflow step.

inputSequences.name: Attorney review escalation
inputSequences.description: Risk or missing rights facts require attorney review.

inputSequences.name: Optimize workstep
inputSequences.description: Matter is suitable for AI-assisted workflow optimization.

inputSequences.name: Docket action

inputSequences.name: Ready for next step
inputSequences.description: Matter is ready to advance to the next controlled step.

inputSequences.name: Baseline without output
